allow:
Bash(git -C /Users/rroche/Work/Dronecode/PX4-Autopilot-ci-orchestrator commit -S -s -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
ci-orchestrator: cache emscripten SDK in failsafe-sim job

Cache the _emscripten_sdk directory keyed on version 4.0.15 so
subsequent runs skip the git clone and install steps \(~30s savings
on cache hit\). The build step sources emsdk_env.sh unchanged.
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/rroche/Work/Dronecode/PX4-Autopilot-ci-orchestrator commit -S -s -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
ci-orchestrator: upgrade SITL and ROS integration runners to 8cpu

ROS Integration Tests \(31m\) is the critical path bottleneck,
followed by SITL Tests tailsitter \(20m\). Both spend significant
time compiling dependencies \(xrce-dds, ROS2 libs, gazebo\). Upgrade
from 4cpu to 8cpu to parallelize compilation and reduce wall-clock.
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/rroche/Work/Dronecode/PX4-Autopilot-ci-orchestrator commit -S -s -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
ci-orchestrator: fix flash analysis comment alignment

Remove extra indentation from code fences and bloaty output inside
the PR comment body so the column alignment renders correctly in
GitHub markdown.
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/rroche/Work/Dronecode/PX4-Autopilot-ci-orchestrator commit -S -s -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
ci-orchestrator: increase SITL test speed factor to 20x

Bump simulation speed factor from 10x to 20x for MAVSDK SITL tests.
With the 8cpu runners this should be sustainable and roughly halve
the 18min test execution phase.
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/rroche/Work/Dronecode/PX4-Autopilot-ci-orchestrator commit -S -s -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
ci-orchestrator: build Gazebo plugins in cache seed job

Add Gazebo Classic plugin build to the build-sitl cache seed job so
downstream SITL test jobs get ccache hits for both PX4 firmware and
Gazebo objects. Bump ccache max_size from 250M to 400M to fit both.
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/rroche/Work/Dronecode/PX4-Autopilot-ci-orchestrator commit -S -s -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: update CI orchestrator docs for 4-tier architecture and caching

Update documentation to reflect recent changes:
- 5-tier to 4-tier restructure \(old T3 merged into T2\)
- Add comprehensive caching strategy section covering ccache key
  patterns, scopes, sizes, and the cache seed pattern
- Document Emscripten SDK cache for failsafe-sim
- Update runner types \(8cpu for SITL/ROS, 16cpu for clang-tidy\)
- SITL tests now run at 20x speed factor
- Remove CI summary job references
- Update tier numbering throughout troubleshooting and best practices
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --draft --title "packaging: add PX4 SITL .deb package" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Single .deb package for PX4 SITL with Gazebo Harmonic resources. Installs to /opt/px4-sitl with a px4-sitl wrapper script symlinked to /usr/bin.

Changes:
- cmake/package.cmake: CPack config for px4-sitl .deb with minimal Gazebo runtime deps
- platforms/posix/CMakeLists.txt: install targets for Gazebo models, worlds, plugins
- Tools/packaging/px4-sitl.sh: launcher script \(XDG dirs, gz_env.sh generation, dartsim symlink fix\)
- Tools/packaging/postinst, postrm: create/remove /usr/bin/px4-sitl symlink
- .github/workflows/build_deb_package.yml: CI to build and validate the .deb
- docs/en/packaging/px4_sitl_deb.md: usage and build docs

Tested with PX4_SIM_MODEL=gz_x500 and sihsim_quadx in Ubuntu 24.04 container.
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -S -s -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
packaging: exclude legacy install rules from .deb builds

Gate legacy install rules behind if\(NOT DPKG_PROGRAM\) so they only
run for tarball/ROS workflows. Gate .deb install rules behind
if\(DPKG_PROGRAM\) so they only run when building .deb packages.

Without this, both rule sets execute during .deb builds, triplicating
files and pulling in the entire source tree \(integrationtests, launch,
Tools, CMakeLists.txt, gazebo-classic models\) into the package.
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -S -s --amend -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
packaging: exclude legacy install rules from .deb builds

Move find_program\(DPKG_PROGRAM dpkg\) into platforms/posix/CMakeLists.txt
so it is available before the install rules are processed \(package.cmake
runs later\). Gate both the top-level posix install block and the
SITL-specific legacy install rules behind if\(NOT DPKG_PROGRAM\) so they
only run for tarball/ROS workflows.

Gate .deb install rules behind if\(DPKG_PROGRAM\) so they only run when
building .deb packages. Mark Gazebo resource installs as OPTIONAL so
CPack does not fail when the gz submodule is not checked out.

Without this, both rule sets execute during .deb builds, triplicating
files and pulling in the entire source tree \(integrationtests, launch,
Tools, CMakeLists.txt, gazebo-classic models\) into the package.

Signed-off-by: Ramon Roche <mrpollo@gmail.com>
EOF
\)")
